sources.title: The Mutilator 1984
sources.description: A college student, who accidentally killed his mother as a child, decides to take his friends to his father's fishing cabin during fall break, not knowing that his crazed father is stalking the place.

metadata.Plot: A group of teenagers decide to take a vacation at the beach house of one of their fathers. The kid whose father owns the house just happened to accidentally kill his mother when he was a child. When they get to the house, the father has mysteriously disappeared. Hmmm...
metadata.Actors: Matt Mitler, Ruth Martinez, Bill Hitchcock
